name: Prajakta Zanzane
title: Frontend Developer & Cloud Enthusiast
tagline: Building digital experiences with code and curiosity.

about.summary: I am a Computer Engineer driven by a relentless curiosity to understand how complex systems scale, perform, and interact. Beyond writing code, I focus on engineering robust solutions that prioritize performance, security, and user trust.
about.details: My technical approach is rooted in systems thinking—analyzing the broader impact of every architectural decision. While my core expertise lies in full-stack web development and backend fundamentals, I am actively expanding into cloud infrastructure and Artificial Intelligence. I believe in the responsible and ethical integration of AI, ensuring that innovation never comes at the cost of reliability or human values. Whether optimizing database queries or designing secure APIs, I am committed to building software that stands the test of time.
